series_metadata.series_description: Alphabetical files by vendor of agency purchase orders to include requisitions and supporting documentation of these requests, e.g. bids, signature approvals, pricing and copies of invoices.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office , audited by Auditor of State and audited report is released and discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: in office , audited by Auditor of State and audited report is released and discrepancies are resolved
